    BioPAX loader for biological pathways and networks.

    Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.

    NeuroML loader for computational neuroscience models.

    PhyloXML loader for phylogenetic tree data.

    Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for Episteme.

    - Lindenmayer systems for fractal and plant modeling.

    org.episteme.social.architecture
    Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
    org.episteme.social.architecture.lift
    Provides mathematical models and discrete simulations for vertical transportation systems (elevators/lifts).
    org.episteme.social.architecture.loaders
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.architecture.loaders package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
    Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
    org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Provides mathematical and computational models for urban planning, land-use analysis, and urban climatology.
    org.episteme.social.arts
    - artworks, music, literature classification.
    org.episteme.social.arts.culinary
    - recipes, cooking techniques.
    org.episteme.social.arts.dance
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.arts.dance package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.arts.loaders
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.arts.loaders package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.arts.music
    - musical notes, instruments, compositions.
    org.episteme.social.arts.theater
    - plays, performances, dramatic arts.
    org.episteme.social.device.actuators
     
    org.episteme.social.device.sim
    Provides classes and interfaces for org.episteme.core.device.sim.
    org.episteme.social.economics
    Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
    org.episteme.social.economics.analysis
     
    org.episteme.social.economics.inequality
     
    org.episteme.social.economics.loaders
     
    org.episteme.social.economics.models
     
    org.episteme.social.economics.money
    Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
    org.episteme.social.economics.resources
    Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
    org.episteme.social.economics.trade
     
    org.episteme.social.geography
    Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
    org.episteme.social.geography.loaders
     
    org.episteme.social.geography.loaders.gml
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.geography.loaders.gml package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.geography.spatial
     
    org.episteme.social.geography.urban
     
    org.episteme.social.history
    - historical events, timelines, and chronology.
    org.episteme.social.history.archeology
    Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
    org.episteme.social.history.calendars
    Historical and alternate calendar systems for chronological calculations.
    org.episteme.social.history.clock
    Provides the org.episteme.social.history.time module.
    org.episteme.social.history.loaders
     
    org.episteme.social.history.time
    Temporal coordinate and interval support for historical analysis.
    org.episteme.social.law
    Provides the org.episteme.social.law module.
    org.episteme.social.law.loaders
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.law.loaders package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics
    Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.analysis
    User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.braille
    User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders
    User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
    Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.converters
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.converters
    module.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.core
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.core
    module.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.header
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.header
    module.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.theories.hobbs78
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.theories.hobbs78
    module.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.theories.strube02
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.theories.strube02
    module.
    org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.tools
    Provides the
    invalid reference 
    org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.tools
    module.

    User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.

    User interface components and internationalization support for Episteme applications.

    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.medicine package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.philosophy
    Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.
    org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology
    Provides classes for modeling epistemology, the study of knowledge and justified belief.
    org.episteme.social.philosophy.storytelling
    Provides the org.episteme.social.philosophy.storytelling module.
    org.episteme.social.politics
    Provides the org.episteme.social.politics module.
    org.episteme.social.politics.flags
    Provides classes for the study and representation of flags (vexillology).

    org.episteme.social.politics.loaders
     
    org.episteme.social.politics.military
    Social sciences modeling, including economics, political science, and sociology.

    Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology module.
    org.episteme.social.psychology.social
    Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology.social module.

    - social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.

    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.sociology.survey package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.sports
    Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.
